CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2006 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-23-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-23-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Mar-07-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Defendants' Trial De Novo, Settlement on the Record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Sidney Sheray, Esq. for for Plaintiff: Zahir Din, also present.
Defendants: Onzo Bennett and Kandy Bennett, are present in pro per.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Defendants shall pay to Plaintiff and Counsel the settlement sum of $8,000.00 by C/C, to be mailed to Counsel within one week, Dismissal with prejudice upon receipt of the settlement.
Parties understand and agreed to terms.
Matter is deemed settled, trial vacated, and placed on the CRC-225 Calendar in Dept. 212 for Dimissal on March 7, 2006 at 10:00 A.M.
